'''Zhul''' was one of [[Nen Yim]]'s crèche-mates. He was a [[Shaper Adept|shaper adept]] on the [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]] ''[[Baanu Ghezh]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1stm}}
